name_cn:
Genuine Grade Replica Fendi
💗 Orange Lamb Skin
🥖 FD "it's Baguette!" has been given a brand new life in the hands of the designer. Made with Nappa lambskin, embossed double F logo, vintage-style hardware, and a bold, free-spirited vibe. Whether for casual 👀 or modern looks, it's effortless. Despite its small size, it has great capacity. This is a bag that no fashionista can say no to.
Size: 26*13*6
Style 8600
